description: Style NoteShow off your season wardrobe with estelle's elegant neck pieces. You can style them with ethnic garb or blend it in with sugary pastels for a refined finish. These come with a matching set of earrings (so that's one less thing to shop for!) This set is just right to add a feel-good factor to your day-to-night ensemble. Warranty: 1 yearProduct DetailsGold curved link chain with white stone embellishment at each linkFive links embellished with white stones that act as the centre of the chainHas a butterfly claspA pair of earrings shaped like a curved "L' with stone embellishments, has a post and back closureMaterial and care24 carat gold platedPewter base metalEarring posts made of hypo-allergic surgical steel to avoid skin allergiesHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of earrings: 3.5 cmLength of chain: 40 cm
